title: Sentiment Analyzer Input
description: Analyze sentiment of text inputs using AFINN, VADER, or combined models. Detects emotions, extracts key phrases, and classifies text as positive, negative, neutral, or mixed.

texts.title: Texts to Analyze
texts.description: List of texts to analyze. Each can be a plain string or an object with 'text' and optional 'id' fields. Max 100,000 texts.
default: This product is amazing! Best purchase I've ever made.
Terrible service, waited 2 hours and nobody helped.
The package arrived on Tuesday as expected.

detectEmotions.title: Detect Emotions
detectEmotions.description: Detect specific emotions (joy, anger, sadness, fear, surprise, disgust) in addition to sentiment polarity.

extractKeyPhrases.title: Extract Key Phrases
extractKeyPhrases.description: Extract key phrases/words that contribute most to the sentiment score.

detectLanguage.title: Detect Language
detectLanguage.description: Detect language of each text. Analysis quality is best for English.

sentimentModel.title: Sentiment Model
sentimentModel.description: Sentiment analysis approach: afinn (AFINN-165 lexicon), vader (rules-based), combined (ensemble — most accurate).

neutralThreshold.title: Neutral Threshold
neutralThreshold.description: Compound score between -threshold and +threshold is classified as neutral. Min: 0.01, Max: 0.30.

includeWordScores.title: Include Word Scores
includeWordScores.description: Include per-word sentiment scores in output (detailed breakdown).

onlySentiment.title: Filter by Sentiment
onlySentiment.description: Filter output to only texts matching this sentiment: positive, negative, neutral, mixed. Leave empty for all.

minimumConfidence.title: Minimum Confidence
minimumConfidence.description: Only output results with confidence >= this threshold. Min: 0, Max: 1.
